task: dynamic graph representation learning (transductive and inductive prediction)
input: sequence of timed events (dynamic graph with evolving features/connectivity)
output: node/edge representations at any time point
backbone: Temporal Graph Network (memory module + graph-based operator)
loss: not specified (task-dependent, e.g., binary cross-entropy for edge prediction)
key_idea: combine a memory module that stores node states with a graph-based operator that aggregates temporal neighborhood information
